_export.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
_export.note: Derived and verified from preserved, hashed artifacts; nothing added.

claim.text: Insolvency status for Able.cz s.r.o. could not be determined: the official insolvency register (ISIR) returned HTTP 500 to subject-search requests on both 2026-07-17 and 2026-07-18.
claim.note: A provider failure is recorded as BLOCKED, never as NOT_FOUND — absence of evidence was not established.

links.note: provider failure evidence lives in provider-runs.ndjson (HTTP 500)
